extraction.one_line_summary: GILBERT Phillipe won the sprint after crosswinds split the peloton at 40km out, with QUINTANA gaining 1:30 on ROGLIC in the front group to take virtual GC lead.
tactical_patterns: Movistar abandoned Valverde's GC support after his rest-day weakness, redirecting full team to Quintana's GC ambitions instead.
Sunweb positioned four riders in wind split then actively chased to drop Jakobsen, prioritizing improved sprint odds over leadout.
UAE refused to chase with Pogacar in second group despite having two teammates forward, betting on regrouping over pace.
Deceuninck isolated Jakobsen pre-split at 40km by controlling tempo, showing willingness to sacrifice sprint stage for tactical gains.

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: gained 1:30 on Roglic via wind split to take virtual red, showing Movistar rebuilt GC strategy around him post-rest day
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: team no longer protecting his GC after worst mountain day before rest day, demoted to Quintana domestique role
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: isolated in second group when Jumbo failed to anticipate crosswind split, surrendered GC lead without teammate support
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: mechanical before split but Deceuninck never waited, revealing team accepted sacrifice for Gilbert/Evenepoel sprint chances
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: UAE had two riders forward but refused to chase, accepting 1:30 loss rather than burning Pogacar early
